k4_system_recap: >>> RECAP: In the dark forest east of Eldenrath, the hero encountered Kael, a treasure hunter. Ancient ruins with primordial magic were discovered. A nightmare revealed Nihilus for the first time. The Erdross boss was slain in the mine. A mysterious crystal with an unknown energy signature triggered an A.R.I.A. system glitch - the system recognized something familiar.
k4_protag_tower: Up there... the tower pierces the clouds. Who builds something like this in the middle of nowhere?
k4_system_scan: >>> Structure scanned. Massive magic output detected. Protective barrier active. Age: estimated 200+ years.
k4_aria_energy: The energy here is... different. Not threatening, more inquisitive. As if the tower itself were curious.
k4_protag_barrier: An invisible wall. I can't get through.
k4_system_barrier: >>> Class A magic barrier detected. Standard breach impossible. Analyzing weaknesses...
k4_aria_hack: Let me try. The barrier has a pattern... If I adjust the frequency of my scans... There!
k4_system_barrier_down: >>> Barrier deactivated. Access granted. WARNING: The occupant has been notified of the breach.
k4_aldric_welcome: A visitor! How exciting! Do you know how long it's been since someone broke through my barrier? Twelve years!
k4_protag_surprised: You're... the archmage? You look like a student.
k4_aldric_excited: Aldric, at your service! And yes, I know - young for an archmage. But age is just a number when you know the secrets of arcane currents!
k4_aria_careful: He talks a lot. That's either enthusiasm or a distraction. Stay alert.
k4_system_aldric_scan: >>> WARNING: Subject 'Aldric' performing unauthorized scan. Anomalous time signature detected on player. Aldric shows heightened excitement.
k4_aldric_anomaly: Wait... What's this? Your temporal signature is... that can't be. You carry the traces of a time rift within you!
k4_protag_anomaly: Time rift? What do you mean?
k4_aldric_fascinated: Fascinating, absolutely fascinating! The quantum structure of your existence is shifted. You don't belong in this timeline - or at least not entirely!
k4_aria_whisper: What should we tell him? He seems honest, but if he finds out what we know...
k4_choice_tell_truth: Tell him everything. Maybe he can help us.
k4_choice_hide_truth: Say nothing. We barely know him.
k4_protag_tell: Listen, Aldric. I remember almost nothing. Just fragments - a battle, a blinding light, and then I woke up here. Level 1. Starting over.
k4_aldric_amazed: Gods of the old world... A temporal reset? That's theoretically possible, but the energy required... It exceeds anything I know!
k4_aldric_help: You have to show me everything. Every fragment, every memory. I can help you piece the puzzle together!
k4_protag_hide: I'm just an adventurer passing through. Nothing special.
k4_aldric_suspicious: Hmm... You're lying. The anomaly is real, I can see it. But I won't force you to talk. Not yet.
k4_aria_relief: Good. The fewer people who know about this, the safer we are.
k4_aldric_library: Welcome to my inner sanctum! 47,000 volumes, 3,000 scrolls, and a collection of magical artifacts second to none!
k4_protag_books: So many books... Some of them are glowing. Are they dangerous?
k4_system_lore: >>> Database cross-reference. 340 references to 'time magic' found. 12 references to 'time rift'. 1 reference to 'temporal reset'. Classified as: Forbidden Knowledge.
k4_aria_knowledge: There's more knowledge gathered here than in all the libraries of Eldenrath combined. Aldric is either a genius or a madman.
k4_aldric_experiment: I'm working on an experiment! A controlled micro-rift generation. Just a tiny peek through the veil of time. Want to help?
k4_choice_support: Sure, let's do it. What could possibly go wrong?
k4_choice_warn: That sounds dangerous. Maybe you should be more careful.
k4_protag_support: Show me what you're doing. If I'm already an anomaly, one more experiment can't hurt.
k4_aldric_start: Excellent! Hold this rune and focus on the point exactly... HERE!
k4_system_explosion: >>> ALERT: Uncontrolled energy release. Local space-time rift detected for 0.003 seconds. Tower damage: minimal.
k4_aldric_oops: Uh... that hole in the ceiling was already there before. Mostly. But did you see the data flood we got?!
k4_aria_damage: My head... For a moment I could see EVERYTHING. Every timeline, every possibility... It was overwhelming.
k4_aldric_discovery: The data is incredible! It says here... the time rift spell isn't a normal spell. It's a SYSTEM. Someone deliberately built it into the fabric of reality!
k4_protag_warn: Aldric, time rifts sound like something you shouldn't summon lightly. I've seen what they're capable of.
k4_aldric_listen: You... you're right. I sometimes get carried away by my enthusiasm. It almost killed me once.
k4_aldric_respect: Thank you. Most people just encourage my madness. It's... refreshing when someone is honest.
k4_aldric_ascent: The upper floors have been sealed for years. The old guardian golem controls access. I've never been able to defeat it.
k4_protag_ascent: Then it's time it met someone new.
k4_system_guardian: >>> Massive energy signature activated. Tower Guardian 'Sentinel' online. Combat system: initialized.
k4_aldric_scroll: Finally at the top! Here's the observatory and... wait. What's this scroll?
k4_aldric_pale: No... that can't... This handwriting... it's ME. But I never wrote this!
k4_protag_what: Aldric? You've gone pale. What does it say?
k4_aldric_zeitriss: It says: 'Time rift magic was not created. It was UNLEASHED. And the key is the hero himself.' That's my handwriting, but from another timeline...
k4_system_glitch: >>> SYSTEM ERROR. Temporal inconsistency detected. ARIA core reacting to time rift reference. Emergency restart suppressed...
k4_aria_glitch: I... I remember something. Just a flash. Aldric... I knew you. In another life. I'm certain.
k4_consq_tell_aldric: I believe you. And I swear on my research - I'll do everything to help you. Here, take this amulet. It amplifies the resonance of your fragments.
k4_consq_tell_aria: >>> Trust bond with Aldric significantly increased. His arcane resources are now at our disposal. A powerful ally.
k4_consq_hide_aldric: Fair enough. I'm a patient man. But remember this: I will find out the truth. Whether you help me or not.
k4_consq_hide_protag: That look in his eyes... he won't let this go. I hope that was the right call.
k4_consq_support_protag: My hands are still tingling. For a moment I could see the rifts between worlds - like fine spider webs made of light.
k4_consq_support_aldric: You have a natural affinity for time magic! This confirms my theory. You're not here by chance - you're the key!
k4_consq_warn_aldric: You're right... I almost made the same mistake again. Instead, let me show you my theoretical notes. Safer, but just as enlightening.
k4_consq_warn_protag: Caution has kept me alive so far. And his gratitude for it feels more genuine than his excitement.
k4_system_level_milestone: >>> MILESTONE: Combat efficiency rank increased. New abilities available. The world registers your growth - and responds. Warning: Stronger foes will be drawn to you.
